PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?senator ?senatorLabel ?county ?countyLabel WHERE {
  ?senator wdt:P39 wd:Q19885926 .
  ?senator p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q19885926 ; pq:P4100 wd:Q7307543 .
  ?senator wdt:P768 ?county .
  ?county wdt:P17 wd:Q1014 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?senator rdfs:label ?senatorLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?senatorLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?county rdfs:label ?countyLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?countyLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY ?senatorLabel
